reference: My wife and I are going through a difficult situation. We have been living together for eight years now, and I have tested positive for chlamydia while my wife tested negative. Since we have been together, I swear to God that I have not cheated on her, but she does not believe me. Now we are getting closer to a separation or divorce. Can you please help me understand how I could test positive and she could test negative while we even have two children?
text: My wife and I are going through a difficult situation. We have been living together for 8 years now, and I have tested positive for chlamydia while my wife tested negative. Since we have been together, I swear to God that I have not cheated on her, but she does not believe me. Now we are getting closer to a separation or divorce. Can you please help me understand how I could test positive and she could test negative while we even have 2 children?
